description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring a mix of light-colored siding and stone cladding on the lower portion. The structure is elevated, with a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, and a wooden deck area adjacent to the entry. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious patio or terrace, partially enclosed by glass railings, and there is a visible chimney suggesting a fireplace inside. The building sits on a stone base, likely providing both structural support and aesthetic contrast. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on horizontal lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with stone and light siding, elevated on a stone base, featuring large windows, a wooden staircase, and a glass-railed terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden staircase, stone base, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, entry deck, and the transition between stone and siding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, minimal windows, and the stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace area, glass railings, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows and grouped side windows
